_comment: Publication pipeline — human-maintained. Tracks papers through stages. NEVER fabricated: add an entry only for a real paper you are working on. Published papers are auto-summarised from publications.json by research_os.py; this file is for in-progress work (idea → camera-ready). Stages: idea, literature, experiments, writing, internal-review, submitted, under-review, revision, accepted, published, camera-ready, presentation, media. Keep this in reports scope (private); do not expose author-sensitive notes publicly.

papers.title: (example) Replace with a real working-paper title
papers.notes: This is a template entry so the schema is clear. Delete it and add real in-progress papers. research_os.py validates stages and never invents entries.
